name: TETRA TECHNOLOGIES INC
business: TETRA Technologies is an energy services and solutions company operating through two segments: Completion Fluids & Products (manufactures clear brine fluids, calcium chloride, and zinc bromide for oil and gas, industrial, and battery markets) and Water & Flowback Services (provides water management and flowback services to onshore oil and gas operators). The company is also pursuing low-carbon energy initiatives including lithium and bromine extraction from its Arkansas brine leases.
sellsTo: oil and gas exploration and production companies
industrial markets (water treatment, cement, food, road maintenance, etc.)

exposures.sentence: Completion Fluids & Products Segment manufactures and markets clear brine fluids (CBFs), additives, and associated products and services to the oil and gas industry.
produces and markets TETRA PureFlow, an ultra-pure zinc bromide, as well as TETRA PureFlow Plus, an ultra-pure zinc bromide/zinc chloride blend, to several battery technology companies.

The segment also markets liquid and dry calcium chloride products manufactured at its production facilities or purchased from third-party suppliers to a variety of markets outside the energy industry.

We are also pursuing low-carbon energy initiatives that leverage our fluids core chemistry competencies, our significant bromine and lithium resources (including our approximately 40,000 gross acres of brine leases in Arkansas) and technologies

catalysts.event: Eos Energy Enterprises ramps up production, leading to significant increase in TETRA PureFlow Plus battery electrolyte revenue
catalysts.sentence: We completed installation of our bulk electrolyte tanker loading system at our West Memphis plant and expect a significant increase in TETRA PureFlow Plus battery electrolyte revenue as Eos Energy Enterprises ramps up its production in early 2026.
